calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Lamposona, Esq. counsel for Marriott International. Inc. Appellant/Defendant; Relani Belous, Esq. counsel for and with Bahman Sabouni, Respondnet/Plaintiff.

Appeal from Small Claims Judgment of December 29, 2021.

Ms. Belous presents opening statement on behalf of Plaintiff Sabouni.
Ms. Lamposona presents openng statement on behalf of Marriott International, noting the provisions of Civil Code Sec. 1859.

Mr. Sabouni is placed under oath and commences direct testimony. As liability is not disputed, the witness testifies as to damages.

Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 introduced [collective exhibit - various receipts - Excel Summary spreadsheet]. Ms. Lamposona offers no objection. The Court admits Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 into evidence.

Ms. Lamposona commences cross-examination of the witness.

Counsel offer closing argument.

Court retains Appellant's and Respondent's Exhibits.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Jeffrey S. Ross; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D502)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Set For Trial On Mar-16-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 502
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Lamposona, Esq., counsel for and with Yama Anwary, Director of Safety & Security of Marriott International, Inc., Appellant/Defendant; Relani Belous, Esq. counsel for and with Bahman Sabouni, Respondent/Plaintiff.

Appeal from Small Claims Judgment of December 29, 2021.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Continued To Mar-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-29-2021 Judgment Entered
